chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَشْتَرِي الْمَتَاعَ فَيَكْسُدُ عَلَيْهِ وَ الْمُضَارَبَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – A man buys goods so it becomes un-saleable upon him, and the speculation

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/53)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/53)
text: كُلُّ مَالٍ عَمِلْتَ بِهِ فَعَلَيْكَ فِيهِ الزَّكَاةُ إِذَا حَالَ عَلَيْهِ الْحَوْلُ
قَالَ يُونُسُ تَفْسِيرُ ذَلِكَ أَنَّهُ كُلُّ مَا عُمِلَ لِلتِّجَارَةِ مِنْ حَيَوَانٍ وَ غَيْرِهِ فَعَلَيْهِ فِيهِ الزَّكَاة.

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar, from Yunus, from Al A;ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,
‘Heasws said: ‘Every wealth worked with, so upon you is the Zakāt with regards to it, when the year passes by over it’.
Yunus said, ‘The interpretation of that is that everything what is worked with for the business from the animals and other such, so upon him is the Zakāt with regards to it’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ’Isma‘il ibn Marrar from Yunus from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Any asset with which you work is subject to Zakat when one year passes.’ Yunus has said that the explanation for it is that whatever asset is used in business, animals or other assets, it is subject to Zakat.”
